32. Environmental heterophylly can be seen in
- (Pg. 246, E)
A) Larkspur B) Cotton
C) Coriander D) Buttercup
33. The given figure show — (Pg. 246, E)
A) Developmental heterophylly in
buttercups
B) Environmental heterophylly in
larkspur
C) Environmental heterophylly in
buttercup
D) Developmental heterophylly in
Larkspur

development process in (Pg. 246, E)

C) Plant organs D) All of these

A) Developmental heterophylly in
buttercups
B) Environmental heterophylly in
larkspur

buttercup

larkspur
